case_title: RHEA AHSLEY MOORE VS. GURPREET SINGH et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, RHEA AHSLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, GURPREET (DRIVER & OWNER)
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL *GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL; PLAINTIFF R. A. MOORE APPEARS; DEFENDANT G. SINGH ALSO APPEARS; PUNJABI LANGUAGE INTERPRETER MR. KRISHAN L. MUNJAL APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT G. SINGH; ELLEN WATTS APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT SINGH FROM VERICLAIM, INC. INSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERKS M. MANZELLA AND S.VANTREE; NOT REPORTED. D506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, RHEA AHSLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SINGH, GURPREET (DRIVER & OWNER) A1 GOLDEN LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION (OWNER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOORE, RHEA AHSLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, GURPREET (DRIVER & OWNER) A1 GOLDEN LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
